investigation_summary: Federal judge ruled illegal search monopoly via default deals (~$20B+/yr to Apple et al.). Ad-tech monopolization case ongoing. Double Irish / Dutch Sandwich history. $170M COPPA / YouTube Kids; $391M location tracking multistate. Street View WiFi payload. Dragonfly canceled after protest.

profile.tax_summary: Historic Double Irish Dutch Sandwich; UK sweetheart deal scrutiny; ~14–16% recent US effective; EU tax settlements.
profile.legal_summary: DOJ search monopoly liability ruling; ad-tech case; COPPA; AG location settlement; GDPR fines; NLRB organizing settlement.
profile.labor_summary: 2018 walkout; Rubin exit package scandal; shadow workforce of contractors.
profile.environmental_summary: Large data-center footprint; 24/7 carbon-free goal. CDP A (2023). AI energy demand rising.
profile.product_health: YouTube algorithmic radicalization pathway cited in research literature.
